layer.description: Small dog, side view, pixel-art, 24×20 px per frame. Body: elongated oval, colour #C8A04A (golden/tan). Legs: 4 legs indicated as 2px wide blocks, colour #A0803A. Tail: 4px stick at right, curves up at tip (staircase pixels). No anti-aliasing. No gradients.
Head: 8×7px block, slightly rounder, same body colour. Ears: 3×4px drooping flaps, colour #A0803A. Eyes: single 2×2 black dot. Nose: 2×1 px black block. No anti-aliasing.

animation.description: Idle tail-wag cycle. Tail position: frame 0 up, frame 1 neutral, frame 2 down, frame 3 neutral. Pixel offsets: ±2px on tail tip. No body movement. No anti-aliasing.

Walk cycle. Front pair of legs alternates with back pair. Legs: 2px blocks shifting ±1px vertically per frame. Tail wags during walk (±2px). Head bobs ±1px. No anti-aliasing. Staircase pixels for any diagonal lines.
